title: 'Dream of India to host 2036 Olympics, making preparations it' says PM Modi in Independence Day speech
description: In his address to the nation from Delhi's iconic Red Fort on the occasion of the 78th Independence Day, PM Modi described it as a 'dream of India'. "India organising the G20 Summit on a large scale has proven that India has the capability to organise large-scale events... It is the dream of India to host the 2036 Olympics; we are making preparations for that," PM Modi said in his speech.
keywords: Independence Day,2036 Olympics,India to host Olympics,Narendra Modi
